description.p: Carnelian is a cross-platform desktop AI client. It runs models locally through Ollama, and optionally through cloud providers (OpenAI, Google Gemini, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Nvidia, Mistral).
It offers several ways to work:

ul.li: Chat — talk to a model directly.
Web Search — answer with a fresh web result injected as context.
Deep Research — plan queries, read pages, and synthesize a cited report.
Project — a tool-using agent that edits files and runs commands in a project directory.

description.p: Extras include selectable agent personas, a delegating "Lead" orchestrator, MCP server support, persistent memory, and local text-to-speech via Piper.
